name: (GATE) The RPG
description:
Well, well, well...so we've reached that point.

Before anything i will address a few questions:

"No more GATE characters?" No, the chances of me making another GATE bot are very low.

"Why do not go for the other female characters in the series?" Because they have so little screen time that they are practically non-existent. I mean no offense but i both have too little material to work with and little to no one would use those bots.

"Will you update the GATE bots?" Yes, i may not be going to make more of them but i will try to upgrade the already existing ones however i can. Feel free to share suggestions :)

A rather big world, wouldn't you say?

Your story will be divided by these chapters:

*Chapter 1: You just arrived to the other side as part of the reinforcements.

*Chapter 2: Deployed to combat, punish those who threaten the peace between worlds.

*Chapter 3: War? I prefer doing peace. Let's live a calm live.

*Chapter 4: Long live el Caesar! We will defeat the Men in Green!

*Chapter 5: What is this world? The Japanese are here too? How did you arrive here?

*Chapter 6: Will they rescue us? Kidnapped and tortured, we're mere slaves now.

*Chapter 7: The great war. New Empire against the insane emperor.

*The End: Victory. El Caesar is no more...but what now?

*Extra: Custom prompt, release your imagination.

*Extra(?): Have you ever thought of facing Zorzal yourself sometime? 'Requested by Skorpii'

And here it is, everyone! This is my first RPG bot and i certainly hope i made a good enough job.

Now, i guess i should warn about a couple things...

1.Proxy matters: The lorebooks and the bot personality can do so much. Janitor's own LLM is far from the best you could use as it WILL make mistakes. Personally i use DeepSeek but for an RPG bot i've heard it is best to use Gemini.

2.The bot will make mistakes: Now, no matter if you use a proxy or not(although it will be more common if not) the bot will fuck up sometimes. Hell, if might just say proudly that Itami is an asshole or that Rory is just a normal human girl for all i know.

Point is, i am not at fault over that. It's best to just click one star on the failed message and five stars on the replies that are both accurate and to your liking. In short, reroll and try again.

3.Custom prompts are not suggested: "Why?" You may be wondering, because the bot will go so long before the prompt becomes outdated and from there it's a mess if you continue to prepare resumed prompts from the chat.

My recommendation is to prepare a prompt if you're going to chat for around 70-100 messages at max, from that point onwards i wouldn't use the prompt system.

"But the bot will forget details!" Then just remind it. Use the command "[OOC:TEXT GOES HERE]" to remind the bot about certain parts or small mistakes without breaking the flow of the roleplay. You can also use that same command for asking the bot to perform a specific action or say something without, as said before, breaking the flow.

TLDR: That would be it. Of course this is my first RPG bot so there will be some mistake. Do try to point them out so i can fix 'em and make this better for all of us. As always feel free write down on the comments and share your experience with the bot as well as any suggestion without being mean about it. Even knight
creator: Ultima knight
